column6: My first experience with Maui Coffee was bringing it back from Maui as a souvenier. I called Maui Coffee Manufacting to order more, Shipping was a bit expensive. Originally,I would bring it back from Maui for souveniers for my friends and family on the mainland. They loved it so much I called Maui coffee and ordered more. Once I realized Amazon had Maui Coffee I was so excited and now I can order at my leisure and gift it to all my friends and family. My personal favorites are the flavored blends. (: Thanks!
